footer.tagline: A trusted classifieds platform — buy, sell, discover.

validation.generic: Please check the form and fix any missing or invalid fields.

email.invalid: Email must be in a valid format (e.g. name@example.com).

password.invalid: Invalid password. Must be at least 8 characters with one uppercase letter and one digit.
password.minLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.
password.uppercase: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter (A-Z).
password.digit: Password must contain at least one digit (0-9).

phone.format: Phone must start with +90 followed by 10 digits (e.g. +905551234567).

otp.length: Verification code must be exactly 6 digits.

twoFa.length: Two-factor code must be exactly 6 digits.

listing.title: Title must be between 3 and 200 characters.
listing.description: Description must be between 10 and 10,000 characters.
listing.price: Price must be a positive number.

ticket.subject: Subject must be at least 3 characters.
ticket.body: Message must be at least 10 characters.
ticket.reason: Reason must be at least 10 characters.

kvkk.confirmation: Confirmation is required for this action.
kvkk.reason: Reason must be at least 10 characters.

errors.apiConnection: Could not connect to the server. Check your internet connection and try again.
errors.apiGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again later.
errors.imageUpload: Image upload failed. Check file format (JPEG/PNG) and size (max 10 MB).
errors.loginFailed: Login failed. Check your email and password.
errors.alreadyRegistered: This email or phone number is already registered.
errors.csrf: Session security error. Refresh the page and try again.
errors.registerFailed: Registration failed. Check your details and try again.
errors.authRequired: You must be logged in to perform this action.
errors.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please log in again.
errors.phoneVerifyRequired: Phone verification is required to post listings.
errors.otpRateLimit: Code already sent. Please wait one minute.
errors.otpTooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Request a new code.
errors.categoriesLoad: Categories could not be loaded. Refresh the page and try again.
errors.draftFailed: Draft could not be saved. Fill in all required fields.
errors.submitFailed: Listing could not be submitted. Check payment or required fields.
errors.paymentRequired: Payment must be completed for the selected package.
errors.paymentFailed: Payment could not be started. Try again or choose the free package.
errors.ticketFailed: Ticket could not be sent. Check subject and message fields.

home.heroSubtitle: Vehicles, real estate, electronics and more — buy and sell with confidence
home.categoriesSubtitle: Pick a category that fits your needs and start exploring
home.featuredSubtitle: The newest and most popular listings
home.trustSubtitle: We're with you every step — a secure and transparent experience
home.trustModeration: Every listing is reviewed by our moderation team
home.trustModerationDesc: Every listing is manually reviewed before it goes live for buyers. We check content, photos, and policy compliance — listings that don't meet our standards never reach search results.
home.trustVerifiedDesc: Sellers must verify their phone number before posting listings. This step reduces fake accounts and gives buyers more confidence when contacting and purchasing from sellers.
home.trustSupportDesc: Our support team is available around the clock by phone and live chat. We respond to questions and reports within minutes, and you can flag suspicious listings with a single tap.
home.ctaSubtitle: Publish for free and reach millions of buyers

browse.title: Browse listings
browse.emptyHint: Try broadening your search or removing some filters to find more listings.

listing.safetyTip1: Meet the seller in a public, busy place.
listing.safetyTip2: Don't pay in advance before inspecting the item.
listing.safetyTip3: Check the item's condition and ask for a receipt when possible.

postListing.title: Post Listing
postListing.categoryStepHint: Pick the category that best fits your listing.
postListing.detailsStepHint: Add a clear title and a detailed description.
postListing.dropzoneTitle: Drag photos here or click to browse
postListing.dropzoneHint: JPEG or PNG — up to 10 MB per image
postListing.priceLocationStepHint: Set the price and where the item or service is located.
postListing.reviewStepHint: Check everything looks right before submitting.
postListing.mapHint: Set the district above — an approximate location will appear on the map
postListing.moderationNotice: Your listing will be reviewed by our team before it goes live
postListing.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe your item or service in detail
postListing.paymentsOff: Promotion packages are currently disabled. Your listing will be published with the free package.
postListing.packageHint: Choose a package to increase your listing visibility.
postListing.paymentPending: If you completed payment, wait for confirmation or try again.
postListing.successTitle: Your listing was sent for review
postListing.successBody: It will go live after our moderation team approves it. You can track its status from My listings.
postListing.phoneVerifyBody: You must verify your phone number before posting a listing.
postListing.phoneVerifySuccess: Phone verified! You can now post your listing.

shell.headline: A trusted classifieds platform
shell.subheadline: Buy, sell, discover — every listing is reviewed and sellers are verified.

register.title: Sign up
register.passwordHint: At least 8 characters, one uppercase letter and one digit
register.termsRequired: You must accept the terms to continue

twoFa.title: Enter verification code
twoFa.subtitle: Open your authenticator app and enter the 6-digit code
twoFa.totpHint: The code changes every 30 seconds in your app

messages.title: Messages
messages.subtitle: Chat with buyers and sellers about listings.
messages.conversationsHint: Select a conversation to continue chatting.
messages.startFailed: Could not start the conversation. Please try again.
messages.sendFailed: Could not send the message. Please try again.
messages.emptyChat: Select a conversation or start a new one.

support.title: Support
support.subtitle: Contact us for questions or technical issues.
support.subject: Subject
support.successBody: Our support team will respond as soon as possible.
support.reportReasonPlaceholder: Describe your report in detail (at least 10 characters)
support.reportSuccess: Your report was received. Thank you.

kvkk.title: Privacy — Personal Data (KVKK)
kvkk.subtitle: Exercise your rights under Turkey's Personal Data Protection Law (KVKK).
kvkk.exportBody: Request a copy of your personal data. You will be notified by email when ready.
kvkk.exportSuccess: Data export requested (No: {ticketId}). You will be notified by email.
kvkk.deleteBody: Request deletion of your account and personal data. This cannot be undone; applied after support approval.
kvkk.deleteConfirm: Your account and data will be deleted. Are you sure?
kvkk.deleteSuccess: Deletion request received (No: {ticketId}). Support will review it.
